unresolvedChecks.name: Section → Session links
unresolvedChecks.description: All sections must reference existing sessions

unresolvedChecks.name: Parliament size limit
unresolvedChecks.description: Active MPs should never exceed 200 on any date

unresolvedChecks.name: Voting → Session links
unresolvedChecks.description: All votings must reference existing sessions

unresolvedChecks.name: Valid vote values
unresolvedChecks.description: Vote values must be Jaa, Ei, Tyhjää, or Poissa

evidence.title: Vote rows with invalid vote value

unresolvedChecks.name: Speech metadata/content mismatches are exactly has_spoken=0
unresolvedChecks.description: Rows without linked SpeechContent are allowed only when Speech.has_spoken = 0, and has_spoken = 0 rows should not have SpeechContent
unresolvedChecks.details: Metadata rows without content: 19232. Explained by has_spoken=0: 15750. Unexpected missing-content rows: 3482. has_spoken=0 rows with content: 240.

evidence.title: Speech rows missing SpeechContent when has_spoken != 0
Speech rows with has_spoken=0 but SpeechContent exists

unresolvedChecks.name: SpeechContent speaker names match Speech metadata
unresolvedChecks.description: Linked SpeechContent rows should have matching first_name and last_name with Speech

evidence.title: SpeechContent rows where source name differs from Speech name

unresolvedChecks.name: Voting date within 1 day of session date
unresolvedChecks.description: Voting start_time should be within 1 day of session date (sessions can span overnight)
unresolvedChecks.details: 351 votings with >1 day offset from session

evidence.title: Voting rows with >1 day session date offset

unresolvedChecks.name: Committee membership dates valid
unresolvedChecks.description: Committee membership start_date must be ≤ end_date

unresolvedChecks.name: Active MPs have group membership
unresolvedChecks.description: Every active MP should belong to a parliamentary group
unresolvedChecks.details: 22 active MP-date combinations without a group

unresolvedChecks.name: Group member count matches active MPs
unresolvedChecks.description: Active group members count should equal active parliament members count per date

evidence.title: Dates where active group-member count mismatches active MPs

unresolvedChecks.name: SectionDocumentLink -> Section
unresolvedChecks.description: All section document links should reference an existing section

unresolvedChecks.name: SessionNotice -> Session
unresolvedChecks.description: All session notices should reference an existing session
